message:
fix: Docker arm64, Bun timeout, tool result text field bug

- Switch Dockerfile from google-chrome-stable (amd64-only) to chromium
  (multi-arch) for arm64 compatibility
- Add idleTimeout: 255s to Bun.serve() so LLM calls don't get killed
- Fix tool_result content blocks missing required text field when
  chrome.evaluate() returns undefined (JSON.stringify(undefined) → undefined)
- Add defensive ?? "" fallback in both Anthropic and OpenAI tool result
  formatters
- Extract anthropicToolResultMessages as exported function for testability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,10 +19,8 @@ RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
     curl \
     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
 
-# Install Chrome
-RUN wget -q -O - https://dl.google.com/linux/linux_signing_key.pub | gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/google-chrome.gpg \
-    && echo "deb [arch=amd64 signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/google-chrome.gpg] http://dl.google.com/linux/chrome/deb/ stable main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/google-chrome.list \
-    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends google-chrome-stable \
+# Install Chromium (multi-arch: works on both amd64 and arm64)
+RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends chromium \
     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
 
 # Install bun
